heading_content_part: Additional InformationWe ourselves do not sell airline tickets and do not charge extra margins. The mobile application only allows you to compare plane ticket prices in different companies. To purchase a ticket, the application redirects the user to the website of the seller company. All disputes regarding price and payment are resolved with the ticket seller. The final price of the ticket may differ from the price in the application.
